REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-29-2024 - APPEARANCE BY PETER NICHOLAS HADIARIS, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF HANORAH LYNCH. CASE SETTLED PER COUNSEL AT TRIAL CALL. PETER NICHOLAS HADIARIS, FOR FEB-09-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 10:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. OSC WILL BE DISCHARGED IF SANCTIONS ARE PAID PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE OR PARTIES MAY FILE DECLARATIONS TO BE HEARD AT THE OSC HEARING ON 2/9/24. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. DEFENDANT JOHN MURPHY NOTICE OF MOTION AND DEFENDANT JOHN MURPHYS MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES FROM PLAINTIFF HANORAH LYNCH TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET TWO, SUPPLEMENTAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET TWO AND SUPPLEMENTAL DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE (ADCAL ON COURT'S OWN MOTION, NO JPT ON 010224)
Off Calendar Jan-03-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Peter Hadiaris, Esq. 415-694-0052 for Plaintiff.
Thomas Mazzucco, Esq. 415-788-1900 Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. Both motions are argued. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
